summary: @emollick: I think Epoch does a great job benchmarking, but I continue to believe that open weights models are much more fragile, e
whyItMatters: I think Epoch does a great job benchmarking, but I continue to believe that open weights models are much more fragile, especially out-of-distribution, than their benchmarks indicate. Vibe-wise, I don’t think they were only 3 months behind last year or only 4 months behind today. · fxtwitter expansion: 245 likes, 7 retweets, 29 replies, 3 quotes, 26596 views
